title: Repair price history for AMD
recommended_action: Run make focus-price TICKER=AMD, or run make price-refresh TICKERS=AMD; if the free refresh path fails, normalize verified downloaded OHLCV files into data/imports/prices.csv.
reason: AMD: Stooq CSV download requires an API key in this environment. Set STOOQ_API_KEY or use staged manual prices. Run make price-validate and make price-preview before make price-apply; do not fabricate missing history.
